title: aloysia gratissima var. revoluta
intro: Aloysia gratissima var. revoluta, also known as Chilean tea tree or sweet almond verbena, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aloysia gratissima var. revoluta include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping its leaves in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract its active compounds.
